narrative:
New Franklin 2-B (precinct in Summit County) has 849 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a modest Republican lean of 4.2 percentage points.
